subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.2
question_html:
What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with the smallest whole numbers?

__BaCl2 (aq) + __Fe2(SO4)3 (aq) → __FeCl3 (aq) + __BaSO4 (s)

A. 4

B. 6

C. 8

D. 9
examiners_html: This question was well answered while one teacher commented that using 1 as a coefficient in a “sum the coefficients” question seemed tricky.
